title: field name size
text: field name size Specify the maximum size of field names. USYS$ Mnemonic _PARAMS = field name size = FieldNameSize USYS$ Mnemonic _PARAMS = fldnmsize = FieldNameSize Use Applies to Mnemonic Connector Syntax Informix connector INF USYS$INF_PARAMS There are no restrictions on use. Description Use the field name size option to specify the maximum size, in number of bytes, allowed for field names. When specified, the connector truncates field names to the specified size. The minimum size is 18 bytes and the maximum size is 128 bytes. USYS$Mnemonic_PARAMS = field name size = 32 Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
